2604.06427.title: The Depth Ceiling: On the Limits of Large Language Models in Discovering Latent Planning
2604.06427.paper_summary: The viability of chain-of-thought (CoT) monitoring hinges on models being unable to reason effectively in their latent representations. Yet little is known about the limits of such latent reasoning in LLMs. We test these limits by studying whether models can discover multi-step planning strategies without supervision on intermediate steps and execute them latently, within a single forward pass. Using graph path-finding tasks that precisely control the number of required latent planning steps, we uncover a striking limitation unresolved by massive scaling: tiny transformers trained from scratch discover strategies requiring up to three latent steps, fine-tuned GPT-4o and Qwen3-32B reach five, and GPT-5.4 attains seven under few-shot prompting. Although the maximum latent planning depth models can learn during training is five, the discovered strategy generalizes up to eight latent steps at test-time. This reveals a dissociation between the ability to discover a latent strategy under final-answer supervision alone and the ability to execute it once discovered. If similar limits hold more broadly, strategies requiring multiple coordinated latent planning steps may need to be explicitly taught or externalized, lending credence to CoT monitoring.
2604.06427.paper_summary_zh: 鏈式思考（CoT）監控的可行性取決於模型在其潛在表示中無法有效推理。<lb/>然而，對於大型語言模型（LLMs）中這種潛在推理的極限知之甚少。<lb/>我們通過研究模型是否能在沒有對中間步驟的監督下發現多步規劃策略並在單次前向傳播中潛在執行它們來測試這些極限。<lb/>使用精確控制所需潛在規劃步驟數的圖形尋路任務，我們發現了一個令人驚訝的限制，這個限制在大規模擴展中未能解決：從零開始訓練的小型Transformer發現需要最多三個潛在步驟的策略，微調的GPT-4o和Qwen3-32B達到五個，而GPT-5.4在少量提示下達到七個。<lb/>儘管模型在訓練期間能學習的最大潛在規劃深度為五，但發現的策略在測試時可泛化到八個潛在步驟。<lb/>這揭示了在僅有最終答案監督下發現潛在策略的能力與一旦發現後執行該策略的能力之間的脫節。<lb/>如果類似的限制更廣泛地存在，則需要多個協調的潛在規劃步驟的策略可能需要被明確教導或外部化，這為CoT監控提供了可信度。
2604.06427.author: Yi Xu et.al.
2604.06427.authors: Yi Xu, Philipp Jettkant, Laura Ruis
